scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: the Pexels API's entire documented surface is exactly 9 GET endpoints across Photos/Videos/Collections; this bundle now covers all 7 that are discoverable/enumerable without an externally-supplied id (photos, curated_photos, videos, popular_videos, featured_collections, my_collections, collection_media via fan_out over my_collections) and excludes the 2 lone detail-by-id lookups that have no server-side discovery path of their own. Pexels' own docs state plainly that 'Collections cannot be created or modified using the Pexels API' and the API is otherwise entirely read-only (no POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE endpoint exists anywhere in the documented surface), so capabilities.write stays false and this bundle ships no writes.json.

excluded.reason: single-photo detail lookup by id; no list endpoint enumerates arbitrary photo ids independent of a search/curated query already covered by the photos/curated_photos streams, so there is no server-side id source to drive this as a syncable stream without an id supplied from outside the sync

single-video detail lookup by id; no list endpoint enumerates arbitrary video ids independent of a search/popular query already covered by the videos/popular_videos streams, so there is no server-side id source to drive this as a syncable stream without an id supplied from outside the sync
